category_sources: source_facts.description says arss is an ncurses-based monitor for viewing RSS feeds.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and project id brew:arss identify the project as arss.
docs_sources: Official upstream GitHub README is the best available documentation surface for arss.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies RSS feed viewing and ncurses terminal UI.
